results.title: I See By the Banner
results.description: The Cleveland/Bradley County Public Library Board will meet at 4 p.m. Tuesday, July 28, in the Community Room, located on the first floor of the library.

results.title: Lao PM visits Khammuan province, gives advice on poverty alleviation
results.description: VIENTIANE: The Prime Minister visited Khammuan province on Monday (July 20), where he held talks with officials in Xaybuathong and Mahaxay districts and met local residents, discussing ways to alleviate poverty.

results.title: Immigration judge removal orders spike in June
results.description: The number of removals ordered by immigration judges has reached the highest levels in years, nearly tripling since June 2024.

results.title: 4 slogans cleared by CJP for protesters to chant at Jantar Mantar
results.description: Speaking from the protest site at Jantar Mantar, Ashutosh Ranka said ‘negative slogans’ must be avoided since ‘they are looking for a chance to make a narrative’.

results.title: Lebanese PM hails 'beginning of Israeli withdrawal' from country in visit to pilot zone
results.description: Nawaf Salam plants national flag in rubble of Zawtar Al Gharbiyeh in symbolic assertion of sovereignty
